issues.title: Autonomous Repair Engine Re-Validation (534e827)
issues.description: Validation completed for the autonomous QA repair engine and pipeline state machine.
issues.reproduction:
1. Run npm run automation:test
2. Run npm run ai:validate
3. Run npm run security:secrets
4. Run npm run ai:doctor
5. Run npm run ai:auto-cycle:once
issues.expected: Untrusted QA must be tightly controlled by automatic-qa-repair-v1 promotion. Workspace-write must be isolated, receipt must contain CAS signatures, and pipeline must handle crashes/races.
issues.actual: All 12 criteria passed. AI Team control plane correctly handles untrusted QA artifacts and isolates writes through validation trees.
